records.ety: [Gr. 'ana` up + ista`nai to make to stand: cf. statiko`s causing to stand.]

defs: Pertaining to a process or a style of printing from characters in relief on zinc plates.
notes: In this process the letterpress, engraving, or design of any kind is transferred to a zinc plate; the parts not covered with ink are eaten out, leaving a facsimile in relief to be printed from.
